Net spend ( total_net_spend_usd ) Your cost (in USD) after any discounts, credits, or negotiated rates are applied. This is what you actually spent. Net spend ( total_net_spend_usd ) Your cost (in USD) after any discounts, credits, or negotiated rates are applied. This is what you actually spent. Your cost (in USD) after any discounts, credits, or negotiated rates are applied. This is what you actually spent. Gross spend ( total_gross_spend_usd ) Your cost (in USD) before any discounts or credits. Gross spend ( total_gross_spend_usd ) Your cost (in USD) before any discounts or credits. Your cost (in USD) before any discounts or credits. Important: Spend data refreshes daily and has a one-day delay. For usage-based Enterprise plans, the export captures your organization's full usage. For seat-based Enterprise plans with extra usage enabled, the export only reflects spend that exceeds your seat allotment . Claude.ai Navigate to Analytics > Claude.ai to view usage and activity metrics for your organization. This page includes the following analytics: Chats Chats per day Chats per day Percentage of users with 1 or more chat Percentage of users with 1 or more chat Total number of chats (1 week, 1 month, 3 months, 1 year) Total number of chats (1 week, 1 month, 3 months, 1 year) Projects Projects created per day Projects created per day Percentage of users with 1 or more project Percentage of users with 1 or more project Top 10 users by projects used (month-to-date, quarter-to-date, year-to-date, 1 year) Top 10 users by projects used (month-to-date, quarter-to-date, year-to-date, 1 year) Artifacts Artifacts created per day Artifacts created per day Percentage of users with 1 or more artifact Percentage of users with 1 or more artifact Top 10 users by artifacts generated (month-to-date, quarter-to-date, year-to-date, 1 year) Top
